mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.team_id, a.competition_id, a.award_rank, t.team AS teamName FROM award a LEFT JOIN team t ON a.team_id = t.id WHERE a.competition_id = #{competitionId} order by a.award_rank
SELECT c.id, c.competition_name FROM competition c WHERE c.awards_status = #{awards} AND c.activity_end < NOW() ORDER BY c.activity_end DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT DISTINCT w.picture FROM award a JOIN work w ON a.team_id = w.team_id AND a.competition_id = w.competition_id WHERE a.competition_id = #{competitionId} AND a.award_rank = 1
select u.username from team t left join team_user tu on t.id = tu.team_id left join user u on tu.user_id = u.id where t.id = #{teamId}
SELECT DISTINCT a.award_url FROM award a JOIN team_user tu ON a.team_id = tu.team_id WHERE tu.user_id = #{userId}
